name: desafio-pokeapi
description: Proyecto Cypress para pruebas de API contra PokeAPI.

scripts.test: set ELECTRON_RUN_AS_NODE=&& set CYPRESS_CACHE_FOLDER=.cypress-cache&& cypress run
scripts.test:api: set ELECTRON_RUN_AS_NODE=&& set CYPRESS_CACHE_FOLDER=.cypress-cache&& cypress run --spec "cypress/e2e/api/**/*.cy.js"
scripts.test:open: set ELECTRON_RUN_AS_NODE=&& set CYPRESS_CACHE_FOLDER=.cypress-cache&& cypress open
